posts.ownerFullName: Fi Wynne

posts.caption:
@_laynijane 

Three things I learnt after playing uncle for weekend🤓

One🦦🦧🐣
Adults a very still humans...
Layni didn’t stop for about 30 of 48 hours!
Singing “Let it snow”

Doing her poo dance (That’s the dance she does before she needs one and after whilst your trying to clean her up😂)

Going on the slide, the swings, spinning on the lady bugs

Building pretend cars and towers

It showed in plain sight that you could always move more! Get your NEAT up kiddo

Two🦋🌹🌝
The little things in life can and should put a smile on your face😊

Flowers in the park, Birds in the sky, coloring pens and paper, the shapes of food on your plate.
Layni found it all fascinating! I barely noticed, probably because before she said, I was looking down, just took it for granted or my mind had wondered else where. 
Look up and see. Soak up your environment and notice the new😊

Three🥱😴
Kids are bloody hard work! Loved having Layni over night for the first time but daymnnn😆 one plus two equalled a hell of a lot more than three 😴
Kudos to all you parents. Young ones and experienced ones, that job can’t get any easier😅 

I’ll take my hat off to all of you next time you’re in the gym 🤠 I need my bed asap after playing hide and seek for 6 hours and changing 8 nappies! I’m as far as I could bd from wanting to go and train now😅👏🏼
posts.firstComment: I wish I was as tired as when I was childless and thought I was tired. They DO NOT STOP. But they are amazing little beings and worth the disruption ☺️ my little human makes me laugh so much, the simple things that we take for granted amaze them and literally every day is a school day. Precious little things that occasionally you wish you could put in a box and gaffa tape that sucker up just for 5 mins.... or maybe 10

posts.caption:
Since meeting the @hybrd_app team last year we’ve never been so excited!

A training app purpose built for Hybrid Training🤩
From a team of ex Whoop developers this app stacks up against the very best training tools on the market and they’re only just getting started💪🏼

You can download the app today and get 25% off after your free trial with code HAC (only on the website hybrd.com - does not work on Apple🙈)

Head over to their IG from our bio and check it out🤜🏼🤛🏼

posts.caption:
About the weekend 🤩

What a Sunday! ☀️ Our first Hyrox Training Day was an absolute banger from start to finish.

From rowing, running and sled masterclasses 💪 to expert seminars on training and nutrition 🧠, the energy was unreal.

Huge thanks to everyone who came along! It was such a pleasure to coach, cheer and connect with you all ahead of your Hyrox races this season 🤜🏼🤛🏼

We’re already buzzing for the next one… 👀

Big thanks to @colchestersportspark for hosting us and to @brunogiesteiramedia for the 📸

posts.ownerFullName: CrossFit | Hyrox l Hybrid Athlete Coach

posts.caption:
🙌🏼Win a brand new pair of @puma.uk race shoes just for consistently doing what you said to yourself you would👀 

Hybrid Habits is back, starting Monday!

A 6 week challenge to bringing the Hybrid team together to focus on consistently completing daily habits that over the six weeks will compound to help you to perform at your best both in and out of the gym💪🏼

And you can play too🤩

Accumulate as many points as possible over the next six weeks! And of course, points mean prizes🤩

There are two ways to score points each week:
* Daily habits points
* Bonus points 

Daily Habit Points
A point is awarded for completing the habit on the given day:
📝Mindset Monday - set yourself up for your best week by reflecting on 5 questions

📲Tech Tuesday - Spend 1 hour without devices. Take a break from your phone, laptop, TV, Radio etc for 1 hour. Walk, read or just relax instead - look up a see the world🙂 

🥣What you eating Wednesday? - Share a picture of your pre or post workout meal/drink 

🙆‍♀️Tune-Up Thursday: It’s rest day! Check in with the body and complete Mobile in 5 (a follow along mobility session)

🏋🏻‍♂️Form Friday - send a movement video for feedback

🥗Chef Saturday - Cook something from scratch that includes at least one vegetable

🏃🏻‍♂️🏃🏻‍♀️Slow Run Sunday - Take part in HAC Run 🥇Club Sunday’s 

🏆Prizes🏆
🥇1st place: 
£100 @sportshoes_official voucher
1-1 Nutrition Review
A book of your choice
Hybrid Athlete Club Tee

🥈2nd Place: 
A Month supply of @eleatcereal 
1-1 Nutrition Review
A book of your choice
Hybrid Athlete Club Tee

3rd Place: 
🥉£25 Sportshoes voucher
1-1 Nutrition Review
A book of your choice
Hybrid Athlete Club Tee

Comment Race Ready to join us and play along💪🏼

posts.caption: What a hero🫶🏼 @fiwynne_
posts.ownerFullName: CrossFit | Hyrox l Hybrid Athlete Coach

posts.caption:
Were half way through the year😱

What haven’t you done you said you would?
What have you got booked in you want to achieve?

You don’t need to be fit or fast - just willing and able
You could be both already and wanting to be the fittest💪🏼

Over the past 11 years i’ve helped first timers achieve their “unimaginable” and world level athletes realise their potential🤩

If you’re looking for a coach who can help you build the self confidence you need to achieve your ambitious goals

Who will enable you to juggle life’s priorities and find a balance of life and fitness

Who has been there, done it himself and got the sore throat shouting from sidelines supporting too

Pop me a DM or comment “one” and let’s talk 🤜🏼🤛🏼

I can’t wait to get stuck in!

posts.caption:
Country and compounds💪🏼🤩

Cracking start to the week @hybrid.athlete.club 

Legs felt pokey after yesterday’s ride but once we got moving they soon livened up😮‍💨

The morning training is taking some adjusting to, so i’m just focusing on moving well and somewhat snappy
 
4 x 6 Tempo Back Squat @ 70%
EMOM3 - 6/6 Front Rack Step Ups @ 50%
3 x 8 RDL @ 50% of DL

3 sets
KB Side Bend
100m Carry each side

posts.ownerFullName: CrossFit | Hyrox l Hybrid Athlete Coach

posts.caption:
Need accountability, motivation or some new super shoes!?

Nothing does it better than the whole Hybrid team taking on a month long challenge to stay consistent with training and ticking off daily healthy habits🤩

Well, if that doesn’t do it, £700 of prizes from @sportsshoes @veloforte and Hybrid might💪🏼

Join us today on any of our Hyrox programs, score points throughout June for just showing up and doing what you said you would and prizes could be yours!

Comment RoxDaily and we’ll send you a link to a 7-day free trial🤜🏼🤛🏼

posts.ownerFullName: CrossFit | Hyrox l Hybrid Athlete Coach

posts.caption:
@hybrid.athlete.club serving up a 7.5mile easy miler this evening😎

It’s amazing what a little consistency does for the brain! Post baby it went out the window and it took a few weeks to find my groove again, well, i’m still finding it🫠

But running 70km a week again felt so far off. It took so long to get there the first time! 

But the body remembers everything and as soon as your brain gets on board, you’re soon back in the game🤙🏼

Take the pressure off - No target paces - no watch - just run with your head up and remind yourself why you love it
posts.ownerFullName: CrossFit | Hyrox l Hybrid Athlete Coach

posts.ownerFullName: CrossFit | Hyrox l Hybrid Athlete Coach

posts.caption:
The HAC Hyrox Training Camp is HERE🤩

Wanting to do your first Hyrox this year or demolish your PB next season?

This day is absolutely packed with expert led technique workshops and seminars that will deliver absolutely everything you need perform at your very best!

We are very excited to have @tommystevens84 and UK Athletics coaches Richard Pickering and Izzy Brinsden joining us to coach you through:

💪🏼 How to structure your Hyrox training and effectively incorporate other fitness/sports like CrossFit
💪🏼 Technique sessions for running, Rowing and Sleds
💪🏼 Nutrition for Performance seminar 
💪🏼 Coached workouts to put everything into practice

Not only that but we’ll utilise our very own Hyrox Calculator to give you a target for your next Hyrox race with training paces to ensure every session you do from now on takes you one step closer to that target 👌🏽

AND you’ll receive a bespoke race week nutrition plan and a two week trial on our Hyrox program😎

If you’ve got a Hyrox in your sights you cannot miss this!

Book before the end of June and we’ll give you £20 off with the code ‘HACJUNE’

Comment ‘trainingcamp’ and we’ll pop you a link to get booked in 🤜🏼🤛🏼
